title: Welcome to Open Finance!
subtitle: Let's set up your preferences. You can change these anytime in Settings.

baseCurrency.label: Base Currency
baseCurrency.hint: All amounts will be displayed in this currency.

secondaryCurrency.label: Secondary Currency
secondaryCurrency.hint: Shown as a tooltip beside converted amounts. Optional.

dateFormat.label: Date Format
dateFormat.hint: Choose how dates are displayed across the app.

numberFormat.label: Number Format
numberFormat.hint: Choose how numbers and amounts are formatted.
numberFormat.usUkDescription: Comma as thousands separator, dot as decimal (1,234.56)
numberFormat.europeanDescription: Dot as thousands separator, comma as decimal (1.234,56)
numberFormat.frenchSwissDescription: Space as thousands separator, comma as decimal (1 234,56)

amountDisplayMode.label: Amount Display
amountDisplayMode.hint: Choose how monetary amounts are shown across the app.
amountDisplayMode.base_description: Show amounts in your base currency. Hover to see the native amount.
amountDisplayMode.native_description: Show amounts in their original currency. Hover to see the base value.
amountDisplayMode.both_description: Show base and native amounts side by side.

error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
